name: M1: Mobile Terminal Controls
objective: Add mobile-friendly terminal controls: Send button, Stop button, New Line button, and Quick Commands palette for touch devices.
exit_criteria: Send button submits messages to agent via WebSocket
Stop button sends Ctrl+C to interrupt agent
New Line button inserts newline at cursor position
Quick Commands palette shows common actions (/approve, /reject, /stop, /help)
All buttons work on mobile viewport (393px width)
